robot_mascot:
<svg viewBox="0 0 300 250" width="100%">
  <!-- Robot Body -->
  <rect x="100" y="100" width="100" height="80" rx="10" ry="10" fill="#2196F3" stroke="#1976D2" stroke-width="3"/>
  <!-- Robot Head -->
  <circle cx="150" cy="80" r="35" fill="#FF9800" stroke="#F57C00" stroke-width="3"/>
  <!-- Robot Neck -->
  <rect x="140" y="90" width="20" height="15" fill="#FF9800"/>
  <!-- Robot Eyes -->
  <circle cx="135" cy="75" r="8" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="165" cy="75" r="8" fill="white"/>
  <circle cx="135" cy="75" r="3" fill="#333"/>
  <circle cx="165" cy="75" r="3" fill="#333"/>
  <!-- Robot Antenna -->
  <line x1="150" y1="45" x2="150" y2="25" stroke="#FF9800" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <circle cx="150" cy="20" r="7" fill="#E91E63"/>
  <!-- Robot Arms -->
  <rect x="75" y="105" width="25" height="60" rx="5" ry="5" fill="#FF9800" stroke="#F57C00" stroke-width="2"/>
  <rect x="200" y="105" width="25" height="60" rx="5" ry="5" fill="#FF9800" stroke="#F57C00" stroke-width="2"/>
  <!-- Robot Legs -->
  <rect x="115" y="180" width="25" height="40" rx="5" ry="5" fill="#FF9800" stroke="#F57C00" stroke-width="2"/>
  <rect x="160" y="180" width="25" height="40" rx="5" ry="5" fill="#FF9800" stroke="#F57C00" stroke-width="2"/>
  <!-- Speech Bubble -->
  <path d="M200 30 Q220 10 240 30 L240 70 Q220 90 200 70 L190 70 L180 85 L190 70 L200 70 Z" fill="#4CAF50" stroke="#388E3C" stroke-width="2"/>
  <text x="220" y="55" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="16" fill="white" text-anchor="middle">You've got this!</text>
</svg>

problem_visuals.svg_code:
<svg viewBox="0 0 450 280" width="100%">
  <style>
    .hundreds { fill: #2196F3; stroke: #1976D2; stroke-width: 1.5; }
    .tens { fill: #FF9800; stroke: #F57C00; stroke-width: 1.5; }
    .ones { fill: #4CAF50; stroke: #388E3C; stroke-width: 1.5; }
    .removed-ones { fill: #E0E0E0; stroke: #BDBDBD; stroke-width: 1.5; stroke-dasharray: 4 2; }
    .label { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold; fill: #333; }
    .number-label { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; fill: white; text-anchor: middle; }
  </style>

  <!-- Place Value Chart Headers -->
  <text x="80" y="30" class="label">Hundreds</text>
  <text x="200" y="30" class="label">Tens</text>
  <text x="320" y="30" class="label">Ones</text>

  <!-- Initial Number: 348 -->

  <!-- Hundreds (3) -->
  <g transform="translate(40, 50)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="60" height="60" class="hundreds"/>
    <text x="30" y="35" class="number-label">100</text>
    <rect x="0" y="70" width="60" height="60" class="hundreds"/>
    <text x="30" y="105" class="number-label">100</text>
    <rect x="0" y="140" width="60" height="60" class="hundreds"/>
    <text x="30" y="175" class="number-label">100</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Tens (4) -->
  <g transform="translate(190, 50)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="20" height="60" class="tens"/>
    <text x="10" y="35" class="number-label">10</text>
    <rect x="30" y="0" width="20" height="60" class="tens"/>
    <text x="40" y="35" class="number-label">10</text>
    <rect x="0" y="70" width="20" height="60" class="tens"/>
    <text x="10" y="105" class="number-label">10</text>
    <rect x="30" y="70" width="20" height="60" class="tens"/>
    <text x="40" y="105" class="number-label">10</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Ones (8) -->
  <g transform="translate(310, 50)">
    <!-- Original 8 ones -->
    <circle cx="10" cy="10" r="8" class="ones"/>
    <circle cx="30" cy="10" r="8" class="ones"/>
    <circle cx="50" cy="10" r="8" class="ones"/>
    <circle cx="10" cy="30" r="8" class="ones"/>
    <circle cx="30" cy="30" r="8" class="ones"/>
    <circle cx="50" cy="30" r="8" class="ones"/>
    <circle cx="10" cy="50" r="8" class="ones"/>
    <circle cx="30" cy="50" r="8" class="ones"/>

    <!-- 5 ones to be removed (shown with dashed stroke and lighter fill) -->
    <circle cx="10" cy="10" r="8" class="removed-ones"/>
    <circle cx="30" cy="10" r="8" class="removed-ones"/>
    <circle cx="50" cy="10" r="8" class="removed-ones"/>
    <circle cx="10" cy="30" r="8" class="removed-ones"/>
    <circle cx="30" cy="30" r="8" class="removed-ones"/>

    <!-- Arrow indicating removal -->
    <line x1="100" y1="80" x2="70" y2="80" stroke="#E91E63" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)"/>
    <text x="105" y="85" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="16" fill="#E91E63">Remove 5</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Define arrowhead marker -->
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="0" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#E91E63" />
    </marker>
  </defs>
</svg>
problem_visuals.description: A place value chart showing 3 hundreds blocks, 4 tens blocks, and 8 ones circles. Five of the ones circles are visually marked for removal with a dashed outline and lighter fill, indicating subtraction.

problem_visuals.svg_code:
<svg viewBox="0 0 500 350" width="100%">
  <style>
    .hundreds { fill: #2196F3; stroke: #1976D2; stroke-width: 1.5; }
    .tens { fill: #FF9800; stroke: #F57C00; stroke-width: 1.5; }
    .ones { fill: #4CAF50; stroke: #388E3C; stroke-width: 1.5; }
    .removed-tens { fill: #E0E0E0; stroke: #BDBDBD; stroke-width: 1.5; stroke-dasharray: 4 2; }
    .removed-ones { fill: #E0E0E0; stroke: #BDBDBD; stroke-width: 1.5; stroke-dasharray: 4 2; }
    .label { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold; fill: #333; }
    .number-label { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; fill: white; text-anchor: middle; }
    .removal-text { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; fill: #E91E63; }
  </style>

  <!-- Place Value Chart Headers -->
  <text x="100" y="30" class="label">Hundreds</text>
  <text x="250" y="30" class="label">Tens</text>
  <text x="400" y="30" class="label">Ones</text>

  <!-- Initial Number: 579 -->

  <!-- Hundreds (5) -->
  <g transform="translate(50, 50)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="60" height="60" class="hundreds"/>
    <text x="30" y="35" class="number-label">100</text>
    <rect x="0" y="70" width="60" height="60" class="hundreds"/>
    <text x="30" y="105" class="number-label">100</text>
    <rect x="0" y="140" width="60" height="60" class="hundreds"/>
    <text x="30" y="175" class="number-label">100</text>
    <rect x="0" y="210" width="60" height="60" class="hundreds"/>
    <text x="30" y="245" class="number-label">100</text>
    <rect x="0" y="280" width="60" height="60" class="hundreds"/>
    <text x="30" y="315" class="number-label">100</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Tens (7) -->
  <g transform="translate(220, 50)">
    <!-- Original 7 tens -->
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="20" height="60" class="tens"/>
    <text x="10" y="35" class="number-label">10</text>
    <rect x="30" y="0" width="20" height="60" class="tens"/>
    <text x="40" y="35" class="number-label">10</text>
    <rect x="60" y="0" width="20" height="60" class="tens"/>
    <text x="70" y="35" class="number-label">10</text>
    <rect x="0" y="70" width="20" height="60" class="tens"/>
    <text x="10" y="105" class="number-label">10</text>
    <rect x="30" y="70" width="20" height="60" class="tens"/>
    <text x="40" y="105" class="number-label">10</text>
    <rect x="60" y="70" width="20" height="60" class="tens"/>
    <text x="70" y="105" class="number-label">10</text>
    <rect x="0" y="140" width="20" height="60" class="tens"/>
    <text x="10" y="175" class="number-label">10</text>

    <!-- 2 tens to be removed -->
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="20" height="60" class="removed-tens"/>
    <rect x="30" y="0" width="20" height="60" class="removed-tens"/>
    <line x1="90" y1="30" x2="60" y2="30" stroke="#E91E63" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)"/>
    <text x="95" y="35" class="removal-text">Remove 20</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Ones (9) -->
  <g transform="translate(380, 50)">
    <!-- Original 9 ones -->
    <circle cx="10" cy="10" r="8" class="ones"/>
    <circle cx="30" cy="10" r="8" class="ones"/>
    <circle cx="50" cy="10" r="8" class="ones"/>
    <circle cx="10" cy="30" r="8" class="ones"/>
    <circle cx="30" cy="30" r="8" class="ones"/>
    <circle cx="50" cy="30" r="8" class="ones"/>
    <circle cx="10" cy="50" r="8" class="ones"/>
    <circle cx="30" cy="50" r="8" class="ones"/>
    <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="8" class="ones"/>

    <!-- 3 ones to be removed -->
    <circle cx="10" cy="10" r="8" class="removed-ones"/>
    <circle cx="30" cy="10" r="8" class="removed-ones"/>
    <circle cx="50" cy="10" r="8" class="removed-ones"/>
    <line x1="90" y1="30" x2="60" y2="30" stroke="#E91E63" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)"/>
    <text x="95" y="35" class="removal-text">Remove 3</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Define arrowhead marker -->
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="0" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#E91E63" />
    </marker>
  </defs>
</svg>
problem_visuals.description: A place value chart showing 5 hundreds blocks, 7 tens blocks, and 9 ones circles. Two of the tens blocks and three of the ones circles are visually marked for removal with a dashed outline and lighter fill, indicating subtraction.

problem_visuals.svg_code:
<svg viewBox="0 0 500 350" width="100%">
  <style>
    .hundreds { fill: #2196F3; stroke: #1976D2; stroke-width: 1.5; }
    .tens { fill: #FF9800; stroke: #F57C00; stroke-width: 1.5; }
    .ones { fill: #4CAF50; stroke: #388E3C; stroke-width: 1.5; }
    .removed-tens { fill: #E0E0E0; stroke: #BDBDBD; stroke-width: 1.5; stroke-dasharray: 4 2; }
    .removed-ones { fill: #E0E0E0; stroke: #BDBDBD; stroke-width: 1.5; stroke-dasharray: 4 2; }
    .label { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold; fill: #333; }
    .number-label { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; fill: white; text-anchor: middle; }
    .removal-text { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; fill: #E91E63; }
  </style>

  <!-- Place Value Chart Headers -->
  <text x="100" y="30" class="label">Hundreds</text>
  <text x="250" y="30" class="label">Tens</text>
  <text x="400" y="30" class="label">Ones</text>

  <!-- Initial Number: 685 -->

  <!-- Hundreds (6) -->
  <g transform="translate(50, 50)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="60" height="60" class="hundreds"/>
    <text x="30" y="35" class="number-label">100</text>
    <rect x="0" y="70" width="60" height="60" class="hundreds"/>
    <text x="30" y="105" class="number-label">100</text>
    <rect x="0" y="140" width="60" height="60" class="hundreds"/>
    <text x="30" y="175" class="number-label">100</text>
    <rect x="0" y="210" width="60" height="60" class="hundreds"/>
    <text x="30" y="245" class="number-label">100</text>
    <rect x="0" y="280" width="60" height="60" class="hundreds"/>
    <text x="30" y="315" class="number-label">100</text>
    <rect x="70" y="0" width="60" height="60" class="hundreds"/>
    <text x="100" y="35" class="number-label">100</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Tens (8) -->
  <g transform="translate(220, 50)">
    <!-- Original 8 tens -->
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="20" height="60" class="tens"/>
    <text x="10" y="35" class="number-label">10</text>
    <rect x="30" y="0" width="20" height="60" class="tens"/>
    <text x="40" y="35" class="number-label">10</text>
    <rect x="60" y="0" width="20" height="60" class="tens"/>
    <text x="70" y="35" class="number-label">10</text>
    <rect x="90" y="0" width="20" height="60" class="tens"/>
    <text x="100" y="35" class="number-label">10</text>
    <rect x="0" y="70" width="20" height="60" class="tens"/>
    <text x="10" y="105" class="number-label">10</text>
    <rect x="30" y="70" width="20" height="60" class="tens"/>
    <text x="40" y="105" class="number-label">10</text>
    <rect x="60" y="70" width="20" height="60" class="tens"/>
    <text x="70" y="105" class="number-label">10</text>
    <rect x="90" y="70" width="20" height="60" class="tens"/>
    <text x="100" y="105" class="number-label">10</text>

    <!-- 4 tens to be removed -->
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="20" height="60" class="removed-tens"/>
    <rect x="30" y="0" width="20" height="60" class="removed-tens"/>
    <rect x="60" y="0" width="20" height="60" class="removed-tens"/>
    <rect x="90" y="0" width="20" height="60" class="removed-tens"/>
    <line x1="130" y1="30" x2="110" y2="30" stroke="#E91E63" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)"/>
    <text x="135" y="35" class="removal-text">Remove 40</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Ones (5) -->
  <g transform="translate(380, 50)">
    <!-- Original 5 ones -->
    <circle cx="10" cy="10" r="8" class="ones"/>
    <circle cx="30" cy="10" r="8" class="ones"/>
    <circle cx="50" cy="10" r="8" class="ones"/>
    <circle cx="10" cy="30" r="8" class="ones"/>
    <circle cx="30" cy="30" r="8" class="ones"/>

    <!-- 2 ones to be removed -->
    <circle cx="10" cy="10" r="8" class="removed-ones"/>
    <circle cx="30" cy="10" r="8" class="removed-ones"/>
    <line x1="90" y1="30" x2="60" y2="30" stroke="#E91E63" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)"/>
    <text x="95" y="35" class="removal-text">Remove 2</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Define arrowhead marker -->
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="0" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#E91E63" />
    </marker>
  </defs>
</svg>
problem_visuals.description: A place value chart showing 6 hundreds blocks, 8 tens blocks, and 5 ones circles. Four of the tens blocks and two of the ones circles are visually marked for removal with a dashed outline and lighter fill, indicating subtraction.
